title: Sleepless Princess of the Castle
overview: Princess Syalis is abducted from her home of the Nation of Goodereste by Twilight the Demon King. Despite the horrors lurking in the Demon Castle, all Princess Syalis wants is a good night’s sleep.

title: The Princess and Furious Fluff
overview: As Dawner the Hero faces perilous obstacles to rescue Princess Syalis, the princess continues to find creative ways to sleep more comfortably at the Demon Castle.

title: The Princess and Forbidden Knowledge
overview: Princess Syalis is on the loose again meddling with forbidden magical items and causing total mayhem for the Demon Castle.

title: The Princess, Destruction, and a Short Journey
overview: Fed up with her circumstances at the Demon Castle, Princess Syalis goes to great lengths to add luxuries to her castle prison.

title: The Princess and Female Warriors
overview: The female unit, long deployed out in the field, has returned to the Demon Castle to get their first taste of Princess Syalis.

title: The Princess’ Unwavering Choice
overview: Dawner the Hero is having more trouble than expected on his journey to the Demon Castle, so the demon higher ups decide to take some action.

title: Even More Sleepless Princess of the Castle
overview: Princess Syalis wakes to find herself in a completely different castle! What happened and how will she return to the Demon Castle?

title: The Princess and the Frightful Demon Nightmare
overview: Back at the Demon Castle, Princess Syalis interrupts an important meeting to share about her haunted dreams.

title: The Princess and Hostage Training Week
overview: It’s time for Princess Syalis to start acting like a proper hostage, so the demon king issues a decree to help change that.

title: The Princess in Endopolis
overview: Princes Syalis is determined to get her hands on the latest and greatest sleep product, but it’s only available in the Human Realm.

title: The Princess and Troubling Dreams
overview: Princess Syalis feels tired no matter how much sleep she gets, and her troubling dreams aren’t helping.

title: Sleeping Princess of the Demon Castle
overview: Despite living as a captive in the Demon Realm, the princess writes a letter to Santa. The letter’s contents shock the demon king.
